title: High Power Auroral Stimulation (HIPAS)
short description: The HIPAS (HIgh Power Auroral Stimulation) Observatory was a research facility, built to study the ionosphere and its influence on radio communications. It was located 25 miles east of Fairbanks, Alaska in the Fairbanks North Star Borough area.
description:
* 1986-2007
* Was operated by University of California, Los Angeles
* Also used [LIDAR](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/LIDAR) at times (unknown freq)
